x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Redemption Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules on how rewards can be redeemed

Comment
Points can be redeemed via app, online portal, or in-branch only

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Usage Restriction Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions limiting where, how, or for whom a reward can be used.

Comment:
Valid at partner merchants only
Not applicable to cash withdrawal or fees
Non-transferable to other accounts

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Expiration / Forfeiture Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specify validity periods and conditions for losing rewards.

Comment:
Points expire after 12 months; promotional points valid for 3 months only

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Value Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules defining the financial or point value of a reward.

Comment:
$50 cashback reward applied as statement credit
1,000 bonus points added to loyalty account
Partial redemption not allowed

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Compliance Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Legal framework governing reward display and redemption.

Comment:
Subject to banking laws and program regulations
Bank reserves right to modify menu
Dispute resolution clause applies

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Maintenance Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Maintenance Term refers to the rules, conditions, and processes that govern the ongoing management, upkeep, and lifecycle of rewards, reward menus, or loyalty program offerings.

Comment:
Maintenance Term is the set of conditions and processes that govern the ongoing management and lifecycle of rewards, including adding, updating, retiring, or renewing rewards to ensure program effectiveness and compliance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Eligibility Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines who can earn rewards.

Comment::
Must hold a Platinum credit card; account must be active

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Redemption Qualification Criteria
x-enumeration-literals.description:
These defines the conditions that must be met to qualify for reward

Comment:
Points / Balance Threshold  Must have accumulated a minimum number of points, miles, or cash-back balance.

Transaction Requirements  Certain transactions may be required (e.g., spend $500 in a billing cycle to qualify for a reward).

Tier Level  Some rewards are restricted to premium or elite customers based on account type or loyalty tier.

Time-Based Conditions  Rewards may require activity within a specific period to qualify. 

Example: A customer must have at least 10,000 reward points to redeem for a flight ticket.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rewards Notification Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards notifications are system-generated alerts sent to participants or administrators to inform them about the status of rewards in the program. These notifications help ensure timely action and awareness regarding reward availability and validity.

Comment:
Low Inventory Alerts: notifies when the stock of a reward item falls below a predefined threshold.

Expiration Alerts: notifies when a reward or points are approaching their expiration date.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Points Transfer Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Govern the transfer of points to partner programs.

Comment:
Conversion rate (1 point = 0.8 airline mile), min/max transfer, eligible partners, fees.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Partner Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Define rules related to third-party partners.

comment:
Partner compensation, availability of rewards, regional restrictions.
